name: Spinning_Kid
short_description: A rabbit in a capsule capable of rotating the world!
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

In the game you have to rotate the level and guide the rabbit named "KID".

The main character of KID is a crazy but talented inventor.
Spinning_Kid is a sequel and addition to the game Gravity_Kid, with new gameplay. The rabbit continues to invent, in the upcoming journey, the rabbit is able to rotate the entire level 90 degrees.
Spinning_Kid is an independent story with new adventures.
You have to rotate the level, solve puzzles and, of course, collect carrots.

Game features:
  • Level Rotation Adventure
  • Picking carrots
  • Convenient management
  • Difficult levels
  • Physics, doors, keys and traps.
